attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you have all necessary materials and tools before attempting to craft more complex items. Specifically, you should craft a crafting table first, then use it to make a wooden pickaxe and stone pickaxe. After obtaining a stone pickaxe, mine enough cobblestone to craft a furnace. Once you have a furnace, smelt iron ore into iron ingots and then craft an iron pickaxe. Finally, use the iron pickaxe to mine more cobblestone and iron ore as needed. Avoid repeatedly mining cobblestone without making progress towards crafting a furnace.

attempts.reflection: You need to craft oak planks before attempting to make a crafting table. Specifically, you should use the oak log to craft 4 oak planks (craft_oak_planks) before trying to craft the crafting table (craft_crafting_table). This will prevent the repeated failure due to missing materials. Additionally, ensure you have at least one crafting table available to proceed with further crafting steps.
